mapper.insert: insert into premium_course(title, category, summary, content, cover_path, video_path, teacher_name, duration, status, sort_order, click_count, create_time, update_time) values(#{title}, #{category}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverPath}, #{videoPath}, #{teacherName}, #{duration}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{clickCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
